"'''Who's Your Daddy'''" is a [[Canon|non-canon]], humorous short comic from [[Star Wars Tales 20|''Star Wars Tales'' 20]], involving [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] reciting how he is going to introduce himself to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|his son]] during their inevitable [[Duel on Cloud City/Legends|duel]].

==Plot summary==
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] woke up one morning and did [[Gender/Legends|his]] daily routine, brushing his [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] and having breakfast. He was constantly rehearsing how he will reveal the truth about [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Parent/Legends|paternity]] to himself all morning. He finally met up with Luke, and when it came the time to expose the truth to Luke, all that comes out is gibberish.
